Profile 1A and Profile 2 are introduced as follows. 1) E2E profile 1A: - Protection mechanism: Mechanism Description Counter 4bit (explicitly sent) representing numbers from 0 to 14 incremented on every send request. Timeout Timeout is reported by E2E Library to the caller by means of the status flags in E2E_P01ReceiverStatusType Data ID 16 bit, unique number, both bytes of Data ID are included in the CRC calculation but not transmitted (implicit transmission) CRC

R platform A for FREETECH DMS. It tells you how the DMS features are configured and deployed with ETAS AUTOSAR modules. AUTOSAR’s architecture is divided into application code, RTE, OS, BSW, IoHwAbs, CDD, MCAL, SafeTLib as well as lots of integration code. This document shows how to configure and integrate RTE, OS, BSW, IoHwAbs, CDD, MCAL, SafeTLib module based on the deliverable software which covers customer requirements. The ISOLAR-AB tool is used for making the component descriptions. Application code will not be mentioned
